URL: https://github.com/tetherto/qvac
Language: javascript
QVAC - Local AI SDK and libraries for building private, cross-platform, peer-to-peer AI applications. Run LLMs, speech-to-text, translation, and more locally on Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, and iOS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] erikdarlingdata/PerformanceMonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/erikdarlingdata/PerformanceMonitor
Language: c%23
Free, open-source SQL Server performance monitoring — 32 collectors, real-time alerts, graphical plan viewer, MCP server for AI analysis. Supports SQL 2016-2025, Azure SQL, AWS RDS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] kittors/CliRelay
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kittors/CliRelay
Language: go
Wrap Gemini CLI, Antigravity, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code, Qwen Code, iFlow as an OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible API service, allowing you to enjoy the free Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 5, Claude, Qwen model through API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] kubescape/kubescape
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape
Language: go
Kubescape is an open-source Kubernetes security platform for your IDE, CI/CD pipelines, and clusters. It includes risk analysis, security, compliance, and misconfiguration scanning, saving Kubernetes users and administrators precious time, effort, and resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [php] David-Crty/databasement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/David-Crty/databasement
Language: php
Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.
